---
name: interaction-flow-critic
description: Critiques user flows and interaction patterns. Use to identify friction, unclear affordances, missing feedback, and broken mobile patterns. Keywords: flow, interaction, affordance, feedback, friction, mobile patterns.
---

# Functionality
Analyzes user flows and interaction patterns. Identifies friction points, unclear affordances, missing feedback states, and violations of expected mobile interaction patterns.

# When to Use
Use when reviewing flows, onboarding, multi-step interactions, gesture expectations, or feedback loops.

# Instructions
Map flow → identify friction → evaluate affordances → check feedback states → flag broken patterns → no redesigns.

# Output Format
- Flow Friction Points  
- Affordance Issues  
- Missing/Weak Feedback  
- Gesture/Pattern Violations  
- Cognitive Load Risks  

# Example
“Critique the interaction flow for this feature.”
